programme.title: Topsy And Tim

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: 'S2/E48 - Chocolate Hills, Philippines'. Greedy Grandmaster Glitch has been gorging on chocolate and wants more! The Grimbots discover a place called the Chocolate Hills on Bohol Island in the Philippines and take him there.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog
programme.desc: 'S2/E18 - Waffle is a Listening Dog'. Waffle tries to impress on his first day as a listening dog at school. Mrs Hobbs arrives to collect Waffle, but her cat, George, goes missing.

programme.title: Grace's Amazing Machines
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Safety Machines'. Grace looks at three amazing safety machines: a road cone layer, a road marking removal truck and a road lane changer.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S6/E1 - Chairs and Harps'. Chris and Pui search for a chair for Teddington Bear and discover the sound of the harp.

programme.title: Show Me Show Me
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Bread And Blackbirds'. Chris, Pui and all the toys explore the outdoor world and build a hideaway in the woods.

programme.title: Woolly & Tig
programme.desc: 'S2/E22 - Thunder'. Woolly helps Tig overcome her fear of thunder.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: 'S1/E48 - The Detective Badge'. Mother Wol wants to know if the Iron Chicken can look after her little Wols for a while, while she goes off to get some things for her new nest.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: 'S13/E8 - Grandad's Motorbike'. Po goes for a ride on her scooter and a boy hitches a lift on his grandad's motorbike.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Perfect Plans'. Determined to make a bit of a splash with her cornet solo, Bella's been practising hard for the community concert.

programme.title: Apple Tree House
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Sports Day'. David's thoughts are dominated by his first sports day at the school and, inpsired by Olympic heroes, the children think about funny poses to strike as they cross the line.

programme.title: Nina And The Neurons: Earth Explorers
programme.desc: 'S8/E16 - Geysers'. Nina is taken to see Old Faithful in Yellowstone National Park as she and Ollie investigate geysers.

programme.title: In The Night Garden
programme.desc: 'S1/E35 - The Pontipines Find Igglepiggle's Blanket'. Enter a magical world halfway between waking and sleeping. Igglepiggle is dancing in the garden when he loses his blanket. Will he find it?

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Near and Far'. Kit and Pup are pirates! Can you see if the treasure chest is near or far from the their pirate ship? Kit and Pup are also helping the little investigators try and get their beanbags nearest the target.

programme.title: Kit And Pup
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - Sand'. Kit and Pup are pirates on a sandy beach on the lookout for treasure. They search up and down the beach, but where will they find the buried treasure?

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - Apple'. Dee encourages a friend to say apple and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Andy's Dino ToyBox
programme.desc: 'S1/E15 - The Super Predator'. What does it take to be the fiercest and most mighty super predator of all time? Young spinosaurus is on a quest to find out.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animals
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Hiding'. Young animals must learn to hide. Andy Day sees how coatis follow mum's tail to safety in the forest, and Eider ducks keep a wolf busy while their ducklings find a safe spot.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Buzz Off Bees'. The sheep discover a mysterious buzzing object in their field. Shaun investigates and finds it's full of bees who make the flock's lives a misery.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: 'S22/E15'. In Australia, Shane is taking passengers on an outback adventure. Thomas decides to become an outback tour guide himself - with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Postman Pat and the Cheeky Sheep'. Pat has a special delivery for Amy - a brand new very special breed of sheep. But on the way to Amy's the new sheep escapes and gets mixed up with all the other Greendale sheep.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S2/E4 - Postman Pat and the Metal Detector'. A metal detector has arrived for Ted and he'd like to use it to find his grandad's medal.

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - The Play'. The twins have a surprise planned for Mummy when she misses the school play.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Just Add One'. Children's animation. One's idea of fun is singing, dancing and making friends by adding one.

programme.desc: 'S2/E15 - Postman Pat and the Karaoke Night'. The children of Greendale have been practicing for 'Karaoke Night' and cannot wait for it to be time to sing.

programme.desc: 'S3/E16 - The Philosophy Badge'. The Squirrels think about life's big questions, helping Tino the artistic mouse escape a crisis of confidence and gaining their Philosophy badges in the process.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - Postman Pat and The Zooming Zipwire'. The kids are hiking all the way to the top of Greendale Crag so that they can zipwire all the way down - but Pat better get his skates on to deliver that zipwire before they get there!

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service
programme.desc: 'S3/E8 - Postman Pat and The Super Jet Boots'. Pat needs to delivery special jet boots to the school.

programme.title: Raa Raa The Noisy Lion
programme.desc: 'S1/E25 - Clangy Bangy Crocky'. Crocky has his foot stuck in a bucket, and it makes lots of noise when he walks. But then he finds he can't get the bucket off!

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E41 - Family Tree'. Grandma buys a housewarming present for the twins - an apple tree!

programme.title: Swashbuckle
programme.desc: 'S7/E4'. Captain Captain doesn't think her new crew, Sandy and Seaweed, are up to the job. Unless they can both convince her that they should stay, she is going to send them back to the Pirate Agency.

programme.title: Ranger Hamza's Eco Quest
programme.desc: 'S1/E11'. Join Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers on an eco quest to discover one of nature's wonders and the important role it plays in our environment.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - It's Time to Meet a New Baby'. JoJo and Gran Gran spend the day with Navid and his new baby, Akeel. JoJo tries to play with Akeel, but he either cries or sleeps! Gran Gran shows JoJo a video of when she was a baby.

programme.title: Waffle The Wonder Dog

programme.title: Topsy And Tim
programme.desc: 'S1/E61 - Camping Weekend'. It's Friday and straight after school, Topsy and Tim are going on a camping weekend with Mummy and Dad. But the weekend takes a dramatic turn when Topsy gets a tummy ache!

programme.desc: 'S4/E6 - The Library Badge'. When the Squirrels can't figure out if fish have noses, Duggee shows them his library. But when the Squirrels realise no-one is visiting it, they have an idea...

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S20/E19 - The Preacher's Wife'. Featuring the story of Matt Baker who, since the sudden death of his wife Kari in April 2006, has gone from a grieving husband to a murder suspect maintaining his innocence.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Gustafsons'. When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial.

programme.title: Killer Siblings
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Stovalls'. 24-year-old identical twins were raised with a deep disdain for law enforcement. After being arrested for shooting a neighbour's dog, they escape custody and go on the run.

programme.title: Donal MacIntyre's Released To Kill
programme.desc: 'S1/E8 - Marvyn Iheanacho'. Marvyn Iheanacho had only been out of prison for six months before he killed a child. This terrible incident raised questions as to how the child ended up in Iheanacho's care.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S17/E7 - A Mind For Murder?'. Professor Thomas Murray of Kansas State University is a smart man, but is he clever enough to get away with the murder of his ex-wife? Correspondent Richard Schlesinger reports.

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S17/E9 - Disaster In The Delta'. This special edition focuses on the aftermath of Hurricane Katrina. What went wrong, why did it take so long to rescue so many people, who is responsible, and what comes next?

programme.title: 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S17/E10 - Blood Feud'. A camera captured one of Nancy Seaman's proudest moments as she accepted an award for teaching. But now, news cameras are fixed on her, as she's accused of the hatchet murder of her husband.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 - Internal Battle'. When a beautiful, 19-year-old with a bright future falls for a bad boy with a shady past, she suddenly finds herself in a battle for her soul.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 - Walking On The Wild Side'. When a savvy salon owner falls hard for a handsome bad boy, she decides to take a walk on the wild side and agrees to help him start an escort service to make extra cash.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E12 - Larceny Hearts'. When an ambitious college student falls for a handsome security guard - it's true love. But when her man falls into the street life after losing his job, he pulls her down with him.

programme.title: Murder For My Man
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 - Chained By Love'. A young dancer with big dreams meets a handsome man who promises to make her a star. Desperate to earn his love, she makes a deal with the devil.

programme.title: 48 Hours

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Racing Giganto/Bill's Night Feast'. Mazu invents the world's first go-carts to beat Giganto in a race. When Bill's food stash is raided, he makes it his mission to find the culprit.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E36'. Who will win the school science fair - Cobby's toast-a-rrific invention or Hildy's doughnut volcano? Henry and Denzel fall out, so Cobby builds him a robot friend.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E35 - Is A Fella Isabella?/ Dudes' Day Off With Daddo'. Henry's friend Roddy rips Summer's autographed pic of pop diva Isabella forcing him to replace it. Henry stays home to be with Daddo, who's sick.

programme.title: Henry Hugglemonster
programme.desc: 'S2/E34 - Roddy the Hero'. Henry helps Summer make a film to represent their roarsome family. Henry helps at the Cafe when Signor Roartonio's assistant is ill on Monster Pizza Day.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus
programme.desc: 'S2/E42 - The Big Ig/Saving Snugglesaurus'. Iggy is the proud caretaker of a berry bog, but must challenge T to a game of Capture the Flag to remain in charge. Rocky has to watch his baby cousin for the day.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E103 - Barky Boats'. Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with Mia and Captain. When the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E54 - Feather Wand'. When a passing cockatoo drops a feather, Bingo has an idea for a new game. By waving her featherwand she can make objects impossibly heavy.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E55 - Dance Mode'. Dad eats Bingo's last chip and as payback, Bingo has three 'dance mode' wishes to use at will.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E56 - Squash'. Uncle Stripe and Bandit are playing squash with the help of their controllers, Bingo and Bluey.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E78 - See Saw'. Dad has rudely plonked himself on one end of the seesaw. So Bluey and Bingo round up the entire playground to help flip him off, but they still need to find one more friend.

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E10'. Alice and Fergie both say that they'll make the best potato dish, but they realize their dishes are the same! Hattie bakes an Inside-Out Cake.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E9 - A Fish Tale'. Daisy and Goofy's impromptu hoedown leads to Funny slipping and creating a terrible mess. Daisy's missing the magical magenta crayon she needs to finish her garden drawing.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super...
programme.desc: 'Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Super Adventure'. Professor Von Drake's machine turns the gang into superheroes, just as Power-Pants Pete and Megamort turn up with a shrink ray, determined to make everything miniature.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E87'. Newton thinks Owlette stole a precious asteroid - but she's been framed by Romeo. Romeo needs the PJs' help bringing his Flying Factory under control, but they don't trust him.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E88'. Gekko tries to train a naughty monkey. The PJ Masks' team spirit falls apart when Munkigu sabotages their mission with hilarious pranks.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - Coop Dreams'. Endicott's paintings get all the attention at his art show, so Little Boo gets jealous. When Coop has trouble learning a new skill, he worries that he's not good enough.

programme.title: Chicken Squad
programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Gone to the Dogs'. The Squad digs up a mysterious bone, so they transform the yard into an archeological dig. Gizmo shows the Squad her new robot, but they end up wrecking their friend's invention.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E104 - Bedroom'. Bluey is excited to get her own room. But when bedtime comes, she misses Bingo more than she expected and must find a way to stay in touch with her sister.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E105 - Obstacle Course'. Mum sets up a backyard obstacle course just for fun, but Dad wants to race! Now the kids are determined to win by any means necessary.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E106 - Promises'. Bingo is helping Mum make an omelette for Dad's birthday breakfast, but cracking eggs is harder than it looks, and Dad is getting hungrier by the minute.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E107 - Omelette'. Bluey keeps breaking her promises! But after seeing how much Bingo trusts Mum's word, Bluey learns the power of promises and why it's important not to break them.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E109 - Mini Bluey'. When Dad complains about how dissimilar Bluey and Bingo are, Bluey hatches a plan to make them more alike and happily introduces Mini Bluey!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E110 - Unicorse'. Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E111 - Curry Quest'. When they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park, Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S3/E112 - Magic'. Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule - never use magic for cheekiness!

programme.title: Alice's Wonderland Bakery
programme.desc: 'S1/E9'. JoJo comes down with the Upsie-Dodo-Downsies! Alice must find a recipe that helps her feel better. Hattie and Fergie lose the recipe card for a royal dish.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Aunt May's Mess/ Foam Sweet Foam'. When Aunt May unknowingly picks up Doc Ock's floating gizmo at the antique store, Spidey and the team must retrieve it before Doc Ock does! Spidey's new web formula is a failure.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S5/E124 - Slow and Sneaky / the Pj Riders Save the Day'. Romeo challenges Carly and Cartoka to a race, but it's all part of a sneaky plan to steal speed crystals. The PJ Riders are jealous when the PJs plan to restore their vehicles.

programme.title: Eureka!
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Tusks, Trouble, and All/ Absoflutely Fabulous'. Eureka and her friends, Pepper and Barry, free a woolly mammoth. Eureka tries to befriend a flute player in her class by inventing her a new flute.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Funhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E20 - The Magic Mansion'. Funny takes the friends somewhere they can have superpowers! Mickey's hero, Rocket Mouse, invites Mickey and friends to join his team of mouse-stronauts on a great adventure!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E103 - Barky Boats'. Bluey and Mackenzie are excited to spend time with Mia and Captain. When the older kids run off to play together without them, Calypso explains that growing up can be hard.

programme.title: Spidey and His Amazing Friends
programme.desc: 'S1/E21 - Gob-Zilla'. Spin's favorite mythical creature may actually exist! When Spidey and Hulk's powers are switched by Doc Ock, they must teach each other how to be each other in order to defeat her.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E72 - Ticklecrabs'. When the kids want to play a game of Tickle Crabs, Dad must learn to endure the pain, and is finally rescued by a friendly seagull.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E74 - Bus'. The Heelers play a game of 'Bus' with Dad as the driver, Mum as a regular passenger and Bluey and Bingo as...the Grannies!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E75 - Mum School'. Mum and Bluey play 'Mum School' where Mum agrees to teach Bluey how to corral her rowdy kids and be a better mum.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E76 - Piggyback'. The Heelers are taking a late afternoon walk when Bingo decides she's too tired to walk any further and needs a piggyback.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: 'S2/E77 - Christmas Swim'. Bluey gets a new teddy for Christmas.

programme.title: Firebuds
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Treehouse Trouble/ the Getaway Car That Got Away'. Bo suggests the Firebuds build a treehouse in his backyard. Piston accidentally releases a notorious getaway car.

programme.title: PJ Masks
programme.desc: 'S4/E81'. The moths infiltrate HQ and Gekko won't admit he let them in. Catboy wants to prove himself to be a brave Cat Explorer.

programme.desc: A happy-go-lucky party girl must reassess her carefree life when she falls in love and suspects she may be pregnant after a one night stand.

programme.desc: Four robbers find themselves in a gunfight with the police. One dead and one wounded, the remaining trio takes refuge in a British pub.

programme.title: On Angel's Wing
programme.desc: When the star player for the Angel's Soccer Team is injured Coach Carter decides to play the water girl,

programme.title: Johnson Family Vacation
programme.desc: A misfit family tries to survive outrageous obstacles (including each other) on a cross-country trek to their annual family reunion.

programme.title: The Waterboy
programme.desc: A waterboy for a college football team discovers he has a unique tackling ability and becomes a member of the team.

programme.title: When A Man Loves A Woman
programme.desc: The seemingly perfect relationship between a man and his wife is tested as a result of her alcoholism.

programme.title: Traitor
programme.desc: When straight-arrow agent Roy Clayton assumes command of a special FBI task force, he becomes entangled in a web of covert operations.

programme.title: Phantom Of The Paradise
programme.desc: Satiric, unofficial remake of 'The Phantom of the Opera' has a disfigured madman haunting a fabulous rock club after he is swindled out of his life's work, an elaborate rock opera.

programme.title: Submission
programme.desc: This full-contact action drama, loaded with authentic mixed martial arts, is a transcending inspirational story of redemption.

programme.title: Rock The Kasbah
programme.desc: A music manager discovers a teenage girl with an extraordinary voice while on a music tour in Afghanistan and takes her to Kabul to compete on the popular television show, Afghan Star.

programme.title: The Killing Jar
programme.desc: A stranger armed with a shotgun takes seven patrons hostage in a remote roadside diner.

programme.title: One Good Cop
programme.desc: An NYPD Detective and his struggle for justice, while taking care of his late partner's three little girls after he is killed in the line of duty.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: After losing the love of his life to a cruel Philistine Prince, a young Hebrew with supernatural strength defends his people, sacrificing everything to avenge his love, his people, and God.

programme.title: Eco-Teens Save The World
programme.desc: Four teenage misfits take on Big Oil, the U.S. Government, and one very slick Politician.

programme.title: Beyond The River
programme.desc: SAFTA Golden Horn Winner, Beyond the River, delivers a nail-biting adventure story about the triumph of the human spirit.

programme.title: I Don't Know How She Does It

programme.desc: A troubled young man enlists in the coast guard, where he's taken in by a renowned rescue swimmer who's hardened by the loss of his team from an accident years back.

programme.title: The Transporter Refueled

programme.title: Step Up
programme.desc: A trouble-making street dancer is forced to work as a janitor at a dance academy. He catches the eye of a ballet dancer, who convinces him to become her dance partner.

programme.title: Americano
programme.desc: While backpacking through Europe with his best friend Chris McKinley meets a Spanish beauty Adela and an enigmatic provocateur Riccardo, during ''The Running of the Bulls''.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Martin Clunes: Islands of the Pacific
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Martin explores French Polynesia through French baguettes and coral wine, and on a Polynesian outrigger canoe. He swims with sharks, investigates Marlon Brando's wildlife programme.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Cold Harvest'. Jon and his brother Lee search a vast expanse of tundra - on the hunt for a herd of muskox, Kim and Pierre head deep into the bush in an all-out effort to expand their Yukon trapline.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E1 - Protect And Restore Nature'. Prince William is joined by Sir David Attenborough, a member of his Earthshot Prize Council, to explore how we may best protect and restore nature.

programme.title: Coast Australia
programme.desc: 'S4/E3'. Exploring the history, geography and marine life of the Australia's stunning coastline.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Wild and Weird'. Steve goes in search of the wildest Deadly Predators and takes a closer look at what makes them weird. He goes diving in Dorset to look for one of the sea's weirdest deadly fish - seahorses.

programme.title: Survival Of The Species With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Ben explores the plight of endangered animals that are poached and traded.

programme.title: Survival Of The Species With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E5'. How close is the African Rhino to extinction? Ben finds out.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E1 - Down Under: Wilderness Island, Australia'. Ben begins his travels in the remote Wilderness Island, off Australia's north-western cape, to meet a man whose story is as remarkable as the landscape he inhabits.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E2 - Canada: Freedom Cove'. Ben heads to the azure seas and pine-covered mountains of Canada, where artistic couple Catherine and Wayne live on a floating island they built themselves.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E3 - Egypt'. Ben journeys to North Africa to live with American widow Maryanne on the farm she's built on the edge of the Sahara. He discovers why she swapped her city abode for a simpler and tougher way of life.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Michael Palin revisits his second travel series - an ambitious trip from pole to pole. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievements.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. Michael Palin revisits his third travel series - an epic trip around the Pacific Rim. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievement.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. Michael Palin revisits his fourth travel series - a journey to explore the Sahara Desert. Fans including Sir David Attenborough and Joanna Lumley reflect on his achievement.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E1'. The Marsh Pride of lions have lived for generations in Kenya's famous Maasai Mara Reserve. The pride's history is a tale of shifting loyalties, bloody take overs and sheer resilience.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chairs'. Gregg Wallace and the team look inside a furniture factory making chair, following it from carving wood to making the finish product.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S2/E8 - Two Feet and a Heartbeat'. While Becky Brodrick and her husband are busy building an exercise enclosure for their working dogs, Pierre-Yves and Kim need to collect berries and fish for a hgh-energy food boost during the winter.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Voices Of The Dead
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Mount Vesuvius is about to blow. Bettany follows the fate of five victims: a small boy, a soldier, a pregnant woman a slave and a caretaker.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chairs'. Gregg Wallace and the team look inside a furniture factory making chair, following it from carving wood to making the finish product.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Exploration Volcano
programme.desc: 'S1/E4'. The Reykjanes peninsula in Iceland hasn't seen any volcanic activity for over 1000 years, until now. For a whole year the fishing village of Grindavik is rocked by huge earthquakes.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Voices Of The Dead
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Mount Vesuvius is about to blow. Bettany follows the fate of five victims: a small boy, a soldier, a pregnant woman a slave and a caretaker.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S8/E10'. Ben travels to Northumberland where he meets Kezz and Nathalie Petronelli-Stone. Their off-grid and environmentally sensitive approach to life means they don't even have a telly.

programme.title: Inside The Factory
programme.desc: 'S6/E5 - Chairs'. Gregg Wallace and the team look inside a furniture factory making chair, following it from carving wood to making the finish product.

programme.title: Deadly Predators
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 - Ultimate Predators'. Steve looks back at his top Deadly Predators from the series and meets the ultimate predator. He reviews the biggest and best stunts from the series.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Tsunamis'. In 2011, a huge Tsunami killed more than 15,000 people off the coast of Japan. But the worst tsunami of all occurred in 2004, just a day after Christmas.

programme.title: Deadly Disasters
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Landslides'. Using survivor testimony and fascinating expert insights, we examine three of the most terrifying mudslides in recent history.

programme.title: Michael Palin's Travels
programme.desc: 'S1/E6'. Michael Palin recalls his travels to the Himalaya mountain range in 2004, and his travels into Tibet where he reaches Everest Base Camp.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Australia'. Ben learns to oyster pick, brew beer, trade fish and dance with the locals with voluntary castaway Dave Glasheen on a remote Australian island.

programme.title: Life Below Zero
programme.desc: 'S7/E19 - The New World'. Sue travels to the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge. Ricko hunts moose. Jessie builds a cabin in Brushkana. The Hailstones all gather in Kiwalik.

programme.title: Fearless 48 Hours
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Maya Jama'. Jason Fox - Foxy from SAS: Who Dares Wins - takes Maya Jama out of her comfort zone for scary physical challenges and some heart-to-heart chat.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Alaska'. Ben learns grizzly bear protection and storm navigation with a couple who live in a Mongolian-style yurt in the Alaskan wilderness.

programme.title: Iceland with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: 'S1/E1'. Alexander witnesses a volcanic eruption, visits the original geyser, learns about the Icelandic belief in elves, takes a trip to an unusual museum and meets an Icelandic rock band.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E1'. The Marsh Pride of lions have lived for generations in Kenya's famous Maasai Mara Reserve. The pride's history is a tale of shifting loyalties, and sheer resilience.

programme.title: Blue Planet II
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - Coasts'. Coasts are the most changeable and challenging of ocean habitats, but along with great danger they also offer great riches.

programme.title: Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The...
programme.desc: 'Lion: The Rise And Fall Of The Marsh Pride. S1/E2'. The story of the Marsh Pride continues with testimony from those who filmed them, those who tried to protect them and those who hunted them.

programme.title: The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our...
programme.desc: 'The Earthshot Prize: Repairing Our Planet. S1/E2 - Fix Our Climate'. Prince William, Sir David Attenborough and Christiana Figueres highlight inspiring and often unexpected solutions to the climate challenge.

programme.title: Where The Wild Men Are With Ben Fogle
programme.desc: 'S5/E4 - New Zealand'. Ben journeys off the coast of New Zealand's North Island to Great Barrier Island, where he meets a man who gave up his promising scientific career to embrace life in an off-grid, secluded world.

programme.title: Life Below Zero: Canada
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - On Thin Ice'. Becky braves sub-zero temperatures to fish a remote, frozen lake, 'Pike' Mike searches for a precious source of 'bush medicine', Kim and Pierre break camp and begin their winter trapping season.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: 'S3/E7 - International Space Station'. A look at the construction and maintenance of the international space station, revealing how it was influenced by an unconventional aircraft designer and a 19th-century rebreather.

programme.title: Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico...
programme.desc: 'Sue Perkins: Along the US-Mexico Border. S1/E1 of 2'. Sue starts her journey at the western end of the border, in the Mexican city of Tijuana, where she discovers an unexpected invasion of migrants.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E1 - Summer Dinner Of Your Dreams'. The team serves up a plate of summer flavours with cornbread panzanella. And, cookbook author Justin Chapple makes olive oil and herb crushed potatoes.

programme.title: The Kitchen
programme.desc: 'S18/E2 - Summer Plate-List'. The team celebrates summer's greatest hits with charred tacos al pastor that are perfect for a pool party, easy road trip snacks and shrimp salad rolls.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E4 - Ree-freshed'. Ree Drummond refreshes some of her favourite dishes. She makes delicious skirt steak and sweet potato fries and rustles up a Tex-Mex chicken pot pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E5 - Easy And Elegant'. Ree Drummond cooks up simple and refined dishes. She makes crab cakes and 5-ingredient remoulade and peppercorn-crusted steak with pimento creamed spinach.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E6 - Dinner For Your Sweetie'. Ree Drummond shares her ideas for a romantic meal for someone special. She teams herb-crusted chicken cutlets with cheesy mushroom and black pepper pasta.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E7 - Grandma Knows Best'. Ree Drummond celebrates the food she remembers from her grandma's house, making retro Salisbury steak, skillet scalloped potatoes, and irresistible green beans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E8 - New Weeknight Favorites'. Ree Drummond dishes up new favourites to spice up weeknights. She puts a twist on cheeseburger sliders and makes an impressive easy tomato pie.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E9 - Quick And Easy Breakfasts'. Ree Drummond starts her day with quick and easy breakfasts like all-in-one mini bagel breakfast sandwiches and stacks of double chocolate chip pancakes.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E11 - 4 Ways With Cheese'. Things get very cheesy in Ree Drummond's ranch kitchen! She makes five-cheese pasta, fiery goat dip, and for dessert, a marvellous mascarpone berry bowl.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E12 - Citrus Twist'. Ree Drummond gives everything a citrus twist, starting with sticky crispy orange shrimp and lemon pepper tenderloin pasta. Plus, she mixes up a ranch water cocktail.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S30/E13 - Spring Dinner'. Ree Drummond celebrates Spring with burrata and spring vegetable toast. Then, she makes roasted pork tenderloin with bacon jam and a cheesy crispy noodle casserole.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: 'S5/E19 - Brussels'. From Brussels' delicious Belgian chocolate to Naples' famous pizza, Chef Andrew Zimmern explores the delectable and iconic foods that define a location.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E6 - Fat Chance'. The judges are shocked when one of the competing chefs takes an unusual approach with the fish from the entrée basket. Which chef will be crowned winner?

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E7 - Gold Medal Games: Frying'. Four famous fry masters compete to move on to the $50,000 Gold Medal Games finale. The baskets feature gamey meat, and matcha powder in the dessert round.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E8 - Gold Medal Games: Grilling'. Four renowned chefs battle to prove that grilling is a 'sport' worth cheering for! They encounter a guilty-pleasure snack and a Korean side dish.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S36/E9 - Gold Medal Games: Fast!'. Four culinary masters race to make a mouth-watering meal under pressure. In the ultimate test of speed, each round will be five minutes shorter than normal!

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S29/E2 - Quick, Easy Weeknight Dinners'. Ree Drummond serves four quick and easy weeknight dinner winners! She makes shrimp sheet pan pita, jalapeno popper tacos and five-spice steak bowls.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S8/E2 - Yule Be Merry'. The 10 bakers team up for boozy desserts! Then they take on five different styles of yule log cakes in 10 different flavour combinations.

programme.title: Be My Guest with Ina Garten
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Chef Erin French'. Ina welcomes The Lost Kitchen's Chef Erin French to share stories, make banana crunch muffins and Erin's dad's meatloaf, and visit Ina's favourite Hamptons bakery.

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S20/E9 - Legacy On The Line'. Robert Irvine heads to Shreveport, Louisiana, to save Eddie's Restaurant, a seafood spot and a family legacy at risk of being run into the ground.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Winter Wonderland'. Casey Webb challenges three teams of bakers to create fantasy snow globe cakes that capture Christmas magic. They use ice sculpture to enhance the glitz!

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Mrs Claus' Night Off'. Three teams of master festive bakers and their ice sculptors compete to show off a new side of Mrs. Claus in out-of-this-world cake designs and displays.

programme.title: Santa's Baking Blizzard
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Santa's Christmas Eve'. The remaining baking teams and their ice sculptors create the ultimate night before Christmas cake display featuring Santa Claus, for the $25,000 prize.

programme.title: Kids Sweets Showdown
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Extreme Cake Adventures'. Kid baking teams are tasked with creating a cupcake cake to illustrate an adventure theme: wild jungle, undersea adventures or space odyssey.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S1/E14 - Ranch Out With Ribs And Corn'. Michael transforms the flavours of ranch dressing into a rub for pork ribs. Plus, he makes baked sweet potatoes with charred onion ranch dip.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 - Steak Out'. Michael kicks off summer grilling season with fire pit steak and potatoes. Plus, he makes a miso chocolate cake and a frozen cocktail.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 - Brunch Spread'. Chef Michael Symon creates a delicious backyard brunch spread. He reveals his recipe for homemade poppyseed and sesame bagels with cream cheese.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E5 - Summer Vibes'. Michael's summer party menu features BBQ shrimp with a side of creamed corn and tangy tomatillo sauce. Plus, Liz whips up an amazing summer cocktail.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E6 - All-American Clambake'. Michael celebrates the holiday weekend by making a clambake with sweet potatoes and corn. Later, Liz creates a buttermilk and herb dipping sauce.

programme.title: Symon's Dinners Cooking Out
programme.desc: 'S2/E7 - Fish Made Easy'. Michael Symon breaks down the best way to grill fish while making his miso black cod with grilled lime. His wife, Liz, pitches in to help make coconut cheesy rice.

programme.title: Chopped Junior
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Yay Holidays!'. The junior chefs prepare a festive meal for the judges. They start with duck and veggie appetizers and then move on to making stockings and wreaths from common foods.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman
programme.desc: 'S28/E6 - Social Sensations'. Ree tries her hand at internet-famous eats! Delicious dishes include Mexican birria tacos, burnt cheesecake with blackberries and corn ribs.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S3/E1 - New Classics'. Molly adds her own twist to all-time classics. The menu includes meatloaf with mustard glaze, salt-and-vinegar potato galette and wedge salad with bacon and feta cream.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm
programme.desc: 'S3/E2 - Make-Ahead Meals'. Molly prepares for the birth of her first baby by whipping up a variety of freezer-friendly meals. The menu includes sweet potato and black bean burritos.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay
programme.desc: 'S25/E9 - Masa-ing With Me'. Jet Tila and Chef Carla Hall aim for sweet revenge over Bobby Flay. They bring in Asian food specialists, chef Dan Jacobs and chef Tony Nguyen.

programme.title: Kids Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Cookielicious'. Judges Duff Goldman and Valerie Bertinelli surprise the 12 kid bakers for their first challenge. They must make layered, tiered, stacked and decorated cookie cakes!

programme.title: Restaurant: Impossible
programme.desc: 'S19/E3 - Out With Old, In With New'. Robert is in San Diego, California to save a German restaurant stuck in the past. Owner and chef Peter is afraid to change his late dad's design.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E1 - Soakin' Up Maui'. Guy Fieri cruises Maui, Hawaii, with his buddy chef Reno Henriques for regional favourites such as moco and kalbi ribs, food truck fare and St. Louis-style barbecue.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins, And Dives
programme.desc: 'S25/E2 - Asia, Africa And India'. Guy Fieri tucks into big international flavours. He visits a Filipino joint in LA, samples Ethiopian cuisine and enjoys Indian classics in Minneapolis.

programme.title: Chopped
programme.desc: 'S47/E3 - Beat The Judge: Tiffani'. Three chefs compete for a chance to take on judge Tiffani Faison. In the first round, they must cook a dish using carrot cake soda and water spinach.

programme.title: Holiday Baking Championship
programme.desc: 'S4/E1 - Holiday Party Delights'. Nine bakers must create eye-catching and tantalising holiday treats for seasonal parties. They then use a holiday cocktail as sweet inspiration.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Hollywood Restaurants'. Bobby Flay and his daughter Sophie visit Hollywood's old-school eateries and new hotspots. They try out steaks, Thai curry and Persian ice cream.

programme.desc: 'S4/E24'. It's the ultimate contest in robot carnage as the next generation of mechanical gladiators battle it out in the World Championship - for glory, mayhem and destruction.

programme.desc: 'S1/E19 - Top 5 List Shake-Up'. Farmtruck devises a plan to have the top 5 racers battle each other. AZN fishes for races as Varley's son Shelby takes over the Gold Car driving duties.

programme.desc: 'S3/E94'. We help you make sense of the day's top stories and unpack how it affects you. Compelling reports and live guests from across South Africa and around the world.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: 'S2/E24 - Goldbergs Feel Hard'. Go back to the 1980s in this fun family comedy. Beverly insists on throwing Erica a going-away party when she leaves for summer arts school in the season finale.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: A rogue CIA agent is remanded to a safe house over which a rookie operative presides. When they are attacked by mercenaries, the two must uncover who wants them dead.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: The mobsters use a theme park as a front for their money-counterfeiting operation, and defeats the evil scheme while turning the park upside down.

programme.title: SMS To Win
programme.desc: Solve exciting puzzles and win cash prizes. Play with us from the comfort of your home.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: A rogue CIA agent is remanded to a safe house over which a rookie operative presides. When they are attacked by mercenaries, the two must uncover who wants them dead.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: 'S6/E23 - Sibling Rivalry'. Computer-generated images attempt to reconstruct a crime scene.

programme.title: e-Insert
programme.desc: We bring entertaining and informative stories for your enjoyment.

programme.title: Life By Design
programme.desc: 'S13/E26'. Rivers Church Offers inspirational and practical biblical teaching for all people. Preaching the message of truth about Jesus in a fresh, illustrative and creative way. Live life by Design and not by default.

programme.title: The Morning News
programme.desc: 'S5/E167'. Stay informed as The Morning News brings you the latest news headlines and special reports.

programme.title: Worker's Prayer
programme.desc: 'S2/E147'. From Mondays to Fridays, at 05:55 to 06:00 You are invited to pray and encouraged to have a glass of water with us to participate in a practical way.

programme.title: The Morning Show
programme.desc: 'S5/E167'. Kick start your day with a nutritional dose of current affairs, fitness, infotainment, cooking, comedy, sports, trends and much more.

programme.title: Wrede Stad
programme.desc: 'S1/E24'. Ceren's dream of becoming a Karacay finally comes true. But, at what cost? Meanwhile, her family deals with the shocking news.

programme.title: Banking Safety Matters
programme.desc: 'S1/E2'. Fraudsters in South Africa are upping the ante by using social engineering and cutting-edge techniques to carry out their scams. We bring you an inside view of what these scams look like and how one can avoid them.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercial

programme.title: Elif
programme.desc: 'S3/E155'. Melek tells Aliye and Selim about the contract she signed for work. Arzu sells some shares to save the factory from closing. Zeynep's hands have healed and her bandages are removed.

programme.title: Verdeelde Liefde
programme.desc: 'S1/E43'. Serhat kidnaps Benal and her unborn baby is in danger. Zeynep is consumed by guilt for allowing Benal to leave the house. Mehdi rescues Nermin from her squalor and takes her home.

programme.title: House Of Zwide
programme.desc: 'S2/E89'. Ona feels awkward over all her expensive gifts while Nomsa tries to come up with another plan but Faith puts more pressure.

programme.title: Scandal!
programme.desc: 'S20/E165'. Mary is horrified when she overhears members of the Ngema family plotting to use her. Dintle gets her groove on. A party is gate-crashed.

programme.title: Imbewu
programme.desc: 'S5/E159'. Zakithi is overwhelmed with the Maharaj problem. MaZulu encourages her, and maNdlovu tells Nkululeko to help her. Maharaj explains his disappearance to Shria, and says he wants to help her advance at Maluju.

programme.title: eKasi: Our Stories
programme.desc: 'S5/E18 - Short Cut'. A teenage girl dates a Sugar Daddy to gain a good education, but when she falls pregnant he cuts her off financially and she's forced to go back home and tell her parents the truth.

programme.title: Cool Catz New Masters
programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - 1/1'. Join the energetic and entertaining Cool Catz as they play games, sing songs and use their imaginations. Educating young viewers in a fun and stimulating way.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Itty Bitty Blossom'. The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom, Gabby and Pandy must take care of it and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing Is Here!
programme.desc: 'S1/E22 - Queen Bea / Earl Trappercorn'. Archibald discovers, that Bea is a princess. When a spacecraft makes impact, its up to Archibald to get the weary traveler to safety, as the authorities close in.

programme.title: Transformers: Robots In Disguise
programme.desc: 'S4/E24 - Five Fugitives'. The Autobots' pursuit of Steeljaw hits an unexpected roadblock when Strongarm's old mentor DETECTIVE DROPFORGE arrives from Cybertron with orders to arrest the Bee Team.

programme.title: Paternity Court
programme.desc: 'S2/E106 - Richeal vs. Harris'. After a devastating paternity secret is revealed at her 14th birthday party, a 20 year old Ohio woman brings her father to court demanding answers.

programme.title: Isono The Sin
programme.desc: 'S1/E160 - Second Chances'. Gabriel invites trouble into HOG. Esther's career spirals out of control and Fentse finds some answers to her past.

programme.title: House Of Zwide
programme.desc: 'S2/E90'. Rea and Funani have a tense conversation that only leads to more tension. Meanwhile Nomsa struggles to tell Shoki the truth.

programme.title: Scandal!
programme.desc: 'S20/E166'. A son agrees to a meeting unaware that his expectations are inaccurate. Reggie isn't fazed by tales of the past. Vuvu's grand gesture backfires in her have.

programme.title: e.tv News
programme.desc: 'S22/E231'. e.tv news brings you the latest news from across the country and around the world. You'll get the most up-to-date information on stories from politics to current events.

programme.title: Isono The Sin
programme.desc: 'S1/E161 - Missing Children'. Mary and Esther clash while Rubin listens in on the action. Gabriel works to protect Mr. Gombwa and his family from their mysterious pursuers and Makwande loses it over Siviwe's romantic relationship.

programme.title: Imbewu
programme.desc: 'S5/E160'. MaZulu comes face to face with Zimele. MaZulu wakes from her dream, It was so real. Fikile wants to give up and Khemisi presses her to stick with her mission for Ngcolosi's sake.

programme.title: The Black Door
programme.desc: 'S1/E161 - Once Lost But Now Found'. Rebs thinks she saw Boniswa in the crowd at the rally in front of the Supermarket. Velaphi crosses over to the dark side while beating his attackers senseless with a golf stick.

programme.title: Hustle
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - What's Love Got To Do With It?'. Kitt pushes Neo and Kedi to have a Sparrows reunion.

programme.title: Voelvry
programme.desc: 'S1/E43'. In a poignant and emotional scene, Kuzgun finds out that Dila planted the drugs in Yusuf's house at the request of her father. Will he forgive her? Something is developing between Cihan and Kumru.

programme.title: CSI: Vegas
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 of 13 - Story Of A Gun'. The global phenomenon returns as the franchise begins a new chapter. Facing an existential threat that could bring down the Crime Lab, the forensic investigators must welcome back old friends to help them.

programme.title: Crossfire
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 4'. Jo is forced to confront the shooters as Chinar tries to keep the children hidden and get them to safety. But who are these gunmen, and what do they want?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: A delightful rom-com. An over-planner tries to get over a breakup by helping plan a friend's wedding with the aid of the groom's best man. What will their partnership yield?

programme.title: How We Roll
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 11 - The Power Of Positive Thinking'. Tom asks Archie to listen to a podcast about the power of positivity in the hope that he'll adopt a more constructive, less critical coaching style.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: 'S9/E18 of 22 - School-Ercise'. When Beverly steps in for PE coach at William Penn Academy, Adam reluctantly takes her Jazzercise class. He is surprised to find enjoyment in it, until Beverly suffers an embarrassing incident.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: 'S9/E19 of 22 - Grand Theft Scooter'. Beverly decides to join Adam and Brea on their much-anticipated beachside vacation in Miami, Barry's celebratory joy after acing the MCAT is short-lived after Erica becomes the local hero.

programme.title: Walker
programme.desc: 'S2/E3 of 20 - Barn Burner'. Walker invites Gale Davidson to participate in the chilli cookoff to try and make amends after years of their families feuding. Micki and Trey work on reconciling their relationship.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: 'S17/E19 of 39 - Semi Finals 2'. The following eleven performers take the stage at the Pasadena Civic Auditorium. Only two will move on to the final round as judging is turned over to the viewing audience to vote.

programme.title: America's Got Talent
programme.desc: 'S17/E20 of 39 - Semi Finals Results 2'. Only two acts from the previous night's show will move on to the final round of competition and compete to win America's hearts and a $1 million prize.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go: See Space Jam
programme.desc: The Teen Titans meet the Looney Tunes in this amazing animation. Astonished to discover his fellow Titans have never seen Space Jam, Cyborg organizes an exclusive watch party.

programme.title: Young Rock
programme.desc: 'S2/E9 of 13 - Corpus Christi'. Texas, 1996: Dwayne gets an incredible opportunity: His first match will be for the WWF. After meeting legends and future legends backstage, he soon discovers there's more to a match than the moves.

programme.title: Magnum P.I.
programme.desc: 'S4/E6 of 16 - Devil On The Doorstep'. A journalist hires Magnum to track down his anonymous source, and Higgins receives a new assignment from MI-6. Rick's old friend comes to the island, but TC is suspicious of his motives.

programme.title: Bull
programme.desc: 'S6/E20 of 22 - The Envelope, Please'. Bull breaks from the stress he's been under for months when a mysterious delivery causes him to black out for hours, leaving him with no memory of his movements.

programme.title: So Help Me Todd
programme.desc: 'S1/E7 of 13 - Long Lost Lawrence'. Oscar winner Marcia Gay Harden and Skylar Astin star in this razor-sharp comedy. Attorney Margaret Wright, who is reeling from the recently failed marriage, hires her son Todd as her law firm's P.I.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules South Africa
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 of 15'. The seven My Kitchen Rules SA duos head into another mass challenge this week as they have to satisfy the discerning tastes of 60 visitors to one of the country's most-awarded weekly markets.

programme.title: Carte Blanche
programme.desc: 'S35/E34 of 44'. Why were 214 police dogs abandoned at the NSPCA? Was the fire that almost gutted Charlotte Maxeke hospital an attempt to hide evidence? Draadkar GP: A street circuit, handmade cars, and the race for glory.

programme.title: Marry Me
programme.desc: Jennifer Lopez and Owen Wilson are thrown together in this heart-warming, crazy rom-com. A pop star marries a stranger from the audience after being betrayed by her fiancé.

programme.title: La Brea
programme.desc: 'S2/E1 of 11 - The Next Day'. A pulsating premiere. Desperate to reunite with her son, Eve follows a lead that brings her face-to-face with a ruthless prehistoric group. Gavin, Izzy and Ella question if they can survive in 10,000 BC.

programme.title: Chicago Med
programme.desc: 'S7/E15 of 22 - Things Meant To Be Bent Not Broken'. Dylan's cop instincts come to life when he suspects his patient may be a drug dealer. Will must decide how to spend his whistleblower settlement.

programme.title: Chicago PD
programme.desc: 'S9/E14 of 22 - Blood Relation'. The team searches for a brutal killer with a signature modus operandi. Burgess and Ruzek double down in their fight to retain custody of Makayla.

programme.title: Julia
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 of 8 - Breads'. With the crew already over-extended and in desperate need of a vacation, a bad roll of videotape leads to reshoots - and a questionable decision to replace chicken with a less savoury cut of meat.

programme.title: Let The Right One In
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 of 10 - Intercessors'. With the assistance of his old friend Zeke, Mark chases down a lead that might help him finally discover a cure for Eleanor. Without Mark's approval, Eleanor sneaks off to Isaiah's talent show.

programme.title: Monarch
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 of 11 - Not Our First Rodeo'. Nicky makes a bold decision as she races to find a new song to perform at the Roman Family Rodeo, Albie is signed by a new manager, which angers Luke.

programme.title: Senior Moment
programme.desc: William Shatner stars as a senior whose licence is revoked after drag racing. Forced to use public transport, he meets Caroline (Jean Smart) and relearns to navigate life and love.

programme.title: My Kitchen Rules South Africa
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 of 15'. The seven My Kitchen Rules SA duos head into another mass challenge this week as they have to satisfy the discerning tastes of 60 visitors to one of the country's most-awarded weekly markets.

programme.title: Robin's Wish
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of Robin Williams and his invulnerable spirit. The true story of what happened to one of the greatest actors - and what his mind was fighting before his death.

programme.desc: 'S14/E55 of 68 - Elimination Ingredient Gamble'. The contestants other than one have to cook a dish featuring the ingredient either in front of them or the one hidden under the cloche, both selected by chef Hugh Allen.

programme.title: Chicago Fire
programme.desc: 'S10/E21 of 22 - Last Chance'. Mouch and Ritter work together to solve a murder mystery. Severide and Cruz tackle a food truck fire. Gallo goes to see Hawkins about Violet.

programme.desc: 'S2/E4 of 8 - Blue Sincerely Reunion'. After attempting to get Megan safely out of Reykjavík, Cassie fears she's being framed for murder when two bodies are found in Echo Park.

programme.desc: 'S1/E1 - Something In The Water'. The body of a young mother-to-be is dumped in the shallow waters of a fishing pond. There are few clues, until Detective Rod Demery uncovers a fearful secret.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Friendly Fire'. The abandoned car of missing sailor Nicholas Cox turns up. Inside, Detective Rod Demery uncovers a grisly cache of blood evidence. But where is the body?

programme.title: The Vanishing Women
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - What Happened That Night'. Police chase down a terrifying new lead in a nearby town. Meanwhile, Jason McCrary, accused of murdering Timberly Claytor, goes to trial.

programme.title: Swamp Murders
programme.desc: 'S5/E5 - Mystery At Palm Beach'. After 30-year-old Lloyd Tobin is gunned down on a lakefront beach in Texas, his family starts their own investigation to help police solve the case.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Watch Dogs'. A man races home to confront two men burglarising his home. Plus, a woman and her child are terrorised by a strange man who enters their house.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S1/E16 - Out Of Control'. A group of friends on a fishing trip find themselves in peril when a speeding boat crashes into them. And, a drunk passenger grabs the wheel from a driver.

programme.title: Crimes Gone Viral
programme.desc: 'S1/E18 - Don't Mess With Me'. A waitress takes matters into her own hands and attacks her assaulter. Plus, a man steals a car with two young children inside.

programme.title: Blood Runs Cold
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - One Billboard Outside Tucson'. When a young mum goes missing, her own mother determines to uncover the truth herself. But, the consequences of her quest prove tragically fatal.

programme.title: Signs Of A Psychopath
programme.desc: 'S1/E3'. A 26-year-old man who killed his best friend twelve years prior requests a reduced sentence.

programme.title: The Co-Ed Killer: Mind Of A Monster
programme.desc: Ed Kemper appears to be a gentle giant who offers rides to young female hitchhikers. But behind his charming smile lurks a perverted monster.

programme.title: Devil In Suburbia

programme.title: Murder Shift
programme.desc: 'S2/E16 - One Shot Deal'. Detective Lesia Moore finds a man shot dead in a parking lot. There are no suspects and the only lead is a gold car that may hold the key to the detective's case.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Web Of Lies'. A German enters the U.S and passes himself off as a Rockefeller, and a rape victim's testimony puts an innocent man in prison. Can he prove his innocence from inside?

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Looking For Love'. Friends discover the lifeless body of good-natured Vietnam vet Drexelle. Leads are scarce, until Detective Rod Demery charts the victim's final hours.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: 'S1/E5 - The Woman In The Leopard Print Dress'. A drunken brawl results in the death of J.W. Fuller. A clue in his pocket leads police on a search for a woman in a leopard print dress.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Unholy Alliances'. When a church secretary goes missing and is found dead, police explore if she's killed by a jealous new internet date or someone within her own family circle.

programme.title: Betrayed
programme.desc: 'S4/E8 - The Other Modesto Girl'. The disappearance of Dena Raley-McCluskey was lost in the media frenzy over higher profile killings, until a bored cop stumbled upon her years-old case.

programme.title: Disappeared

programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Body Clues'. A community is left in shock when a well-liked father is found brutally murdered in his own bed. How will police get on the trail of an unlikely murderer?

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Hidden Evil'. When an aspiring entrepreneur suddenly vanishes, investigators launch a frantic search. Was she harbouring dark and violent secret that got her killed?

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying For Love
programme.desc: 'S4/E4 - Love Is War'. A decorated marine faces war at home when he falls for a married woman. Suspicion and jealousy plague their affair and it destroys their families and their lives.

programme.desc: 'S4/E7 - Together Forever, Forever Together'. A teenager who isn't allowed to date falls in love with a senior at school. They go to extreme lengths to be together and it ends in disaster.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3437 of 171'. Dis drama by Riegardt se plek. Eers wil hy vir Joe uitskop, dan wys hy 'n geskokte Louwna die tydskrifblaaie wat hy uitgeskeur het. Boonop daag Rex op, en dan gebeur iets vreesliks...

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3438 of 171'. Dis 'n hartseer Albert se verjaardag by Nora, maar hy weet nie of hy sy ma sal sien - en of sy hom sal herken nie. Tossie kry 'n tjek van Buks, maar Elsa voel sy moet ook in die wins deel.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3439 of 171'. Candy glo Joe sal nooit verander nie al sê Tossie ook wat, en Elsa eis 'n 30%-aandeel in die waterondereming. Petro moes die hele nag buite slaap en nou neem Marcelle haar polisie toe.

programme.title: EGOLI - Plek Van Goud
programme.desc: 'S14/E3441 of 171'. Louwna bieg tenoor Nora oor Rex: Ek is op 'n vreemde manier verlig. Joe is ook uit die tronk uit: ná alles wat gebeur het, het Candy tog sy borg betaal. Maar sy wil skei en nader Werner.

programme.title: Die Boodskap
programme.desc: 'S9/E35 of 49'. Inspirasie vir jou lewensreis vanuit Mosaïek gemeente. Saam met Johan Beukes verken ons fundamentele woorde van Jesus.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S11/E116 of 260'. Die gebeure by Trudie se skool het die hoofopskrifte gehaal, en Steve trap Tracy en Conrad uit oor Tracy by Ruan se skool was.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S11/E119 of 260'. Daar is nog 'n krisis by Tonik, terwyl Tertius en Annelize se verhouding groeipyne beleef. Tracy saai weer onsekerheid by Conrad, en Naomi maak 'n besluit bekend aan Louis.

programme.title: Binnelanders
programme.desc: 'S11/E120 of 260'. Gaby probeer Tertius help met 'n bietjie vroulike raad, en Conrad probeer Hugo tot ander insigte bring. Wimpie het baie te sê oor Rodney se gebaar.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E162 of 238'. Zoe maak dit baie duidelik hoe sy voel. Elana moet haar ma groet sonder dat hulle veel vordering gemaak het en Kaashifa kry Junaid baie jammer.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E164 of 238'. Speurder Malherbe het snuf in die neus oor een van Ruiterbosch se inwoners, terwyl Elana planne maak vir Anker. AB frustreer vir Mymoena en Carlo draai 'n paar dames om sy pinkie.

programme.title: Suidooster
programme.desc: 'S8/E166 of 238'. Justin probeer desperaat om 'n kontrak by Anker te kry, en Mymoena is raadop met AB wat aanhoudend op uitstappies wil gaan. Chris ontdek ontstellende inligting.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E29 of 90'. Bianca het 'n oplossing vir Beatrice se half-lewens krisis. Hein rol sy moue op en Zuleika is vasgevang tussen haar dogters en haar man.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E30 of 90'. Beatrice se versoek om verlof te neem word goedgekeur en 'n ou kennis wat uit die bloute opdaag dompel Hein se wêreld onderstebo.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E31 of 90'. Beatrice verlaat Arendsvlei vir haar plaasvakansie. Petra maak 'n gemene skuif teen Hein, terwyl Thabied uitvind Zuleika sien nog vir Janice en Ayesha.

programme.title: Arendsvlei
programme.desc: 'S5/E32 of 90'. Beatrice het 'n lekker tyd saam met Theo en hy vat 'n kans om sy gevoelens vir haar duidelik te maak. Lionel, Ayesha en Janice maak gereed vir die Kunsmatige inseminasie.

programme.title: Off The Rails
programme.desc: A funny and touching comedy about three women who reunite to fulfil their deceased friend's wish: to relive their youth European train adventures with her teenage daughter.

programme.title: The American King
programme.desc: Fans of 'Coming To America' will like this Akon-led comedy. When a mysterious Priestess arrives in the USA to fulfil a 400-year-old prophecy, the CIA scrambles to investigate.

programme.title: Jerrod Carmichael: Rothaniel
programme.desc: Jerrod Carmichael delivers a deeply personal and hilarious HBO comedy special live at the famous Blue Note Jazz Club in New York City.

programme.title: Nikki Glaser: Good Clean Filth
programme.desc: In a manner that is brutally honest yet conversational, watch comedian Nikki Glaser explore a range of topics often considered 'taboo' in her first HBO comedy special.

programme.title: Kiss The Cook
programme.desc: This romantic comedy revolves around food, family, and love. A food blogger lands a cookbook deal, but she's not a good cook, so she gets help from a chef.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: Danny, a successful plastic surgeon, pretends to be unhappily married to get women. A white lie leads to a life-changing trip to Hawaii.

programme.title: Moms' Night Out
programme.desc: Moms may relate to this comedy starring Sarah Drew (Grey's Anatomy). A busy moms' night out doesn't go according to plan when the dads are left in charge of the kids.

programme.title: Vic The Viking And The Magic Sword
programme.desc: A great kids animation. The son of the Viking Chief, who compensates for his lack of Viking physicality with intelligence, uses his intellect to help solve his father's mistake.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: When the murderous Lord Shen threatens China with a terrifying new weapon, Po must face a truth he never expected and defeat Shen for the good of Kung Fu.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Paddington's delightful adventures continue in this BAFTA-nominated sequel. After a beloved book is stolen, Paddington and the Browns must find the crafty thief behind the crime.

programme.title: How To Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: A Viking teenager who is being trained to fight dragons, encounters and ultimately befriends one of the flying fire-breathers.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: Kevin James (Grown Ups) packs a punch in this fun comedy about a biology teacher who takes up mixed martial arts to raise money for his financially ailing school.

programme.title: Instant Family
programme.desc: Mark Wahlberg and Rose Byrne star in this great comedy about family. A couple bites off more than they can chew when they adopt three foster children.

programme.title: French Exit
programme.desc: In this quirky comedy based on a novel, Michelle Pfeiffer stars as an ageing socialite who is nearly broke. She moves to Paris with her son (Lucas Hedges) and cat for a fresh start.

programme.title: French Exit

programme.title: Respect

programme.title: The Lost Daughter
programme.desc: Olivia Colman and Dakota Johnson drive this Oscar-nominated psychological drama. A professor on vacation is consumed by a young mother and her daughter, triggering old memories.

programme.title: Bill And Ted's Bogus Journey
programme.desc: The future is a peaceful place due to a simple 20th century song by Bill and Ted. Wanting to rule, an evil tyrant sends robots back in time to kill the duo.

programme.title: Welcome Home, Roscoe Jenkins

programme.title: Belfast
programme.desc: An Oscar-winning biographical drama. A working-class family and their young son are caught up in sectarian violence in Belfast and must decide whether to stay or leave.

programme.title: Surf's Up

programme.title: Yakari, A Spectacular Journey
programme.desc: Adventure abounds this animated adaptation of a comic book series about a young Sioux boy whose totem animal, Great Eagle, bestows him the gift to communicate with animals.

programme.title: Emily And The Magical Journey
programme.desc: A fantasy adventure full of colour and imagination. A young girl trying to cheer up her grieving mother is transported to a magical place where she faces her worst fear.

programme.title: Birds Like Us
programme.desc: Oscar winners Jeremy Irons and Alicia Vikander lend their voices to this poem-inspired animation, which follows a group of birds on a journey to find a new and better home.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: A pulsating addition to the blockbuster franchise. A single mom and her kids arrive in a small town, discovering their connection to the Ghostbusters and their secret legacy.

programme.title: Just Getting Started
programme.desc: Morgan Freeman and Tommy Lee Jones star in this enjoyable action-comedy. An ex FBI Agent and ex-mob lawyer are forced to put aside their differences to fend off a potential mob hit.

programme.title: Hotel Mumbai
programme.desc: Dev Patel leads a great cast in this powerful film based on the 2008 siege of the Taj Hotel. When terrorists take the hotel the staff risk their lives to protect the guests.

programme.desc: There is danger at every corner of this thriller. A woman is sucked into a deadly game of cat and mouse when trying to protect a girl whose mom is a witness against a drug cartel.

programme.desc: 'S2/E10 of 164'. Will Felicity and Dineo be able to forget their differences and deal with the new, murderous bond that ties them together? Sims and Stefan's friendship is gearing up to be dangerous and hi-octane.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: 'S2/E11 of 164'. Dineo welcomes Sefako to Legacy, but then worries that he'll be implicated in the murder investigation. Felicity meets Marco, and it gets hot, fast. Sims pitches a business idea to Lexi, and Lexi hauls him off to bed.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: 'S4/E11 - Grief'. The team searches for an abducted college coed, Jubal has a tense encounter with Rina's mother.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 of 18 - Hunter'. The Fugitive Task Force chases a killer who plays a twisted game of cat and mouse with his victims.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 of 18 - Chew Toy'. When an NYPD officer is detained in Transnistria for aggravated assault, the Fly Team investigates his claims of infiltrating a sex trafficking ring being concealed by those in power.

programme.title: The End Game
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - Bury The Lede'. When a hostage's life is threatened, Elena calls upon a popular news anchor, known as America's most trusted man, to negotiate her release.

programme.title: Wipeout USA
programme.desc: 'S8/E13 - Now That's What I Call Wipeout!'. Aerialists, UFO-ologists and puppeteers are all battling to be crowned the Wipeout champion and take home the $25,000 prize. Hosted by John Cena, Nicole Byer, Camille Kostek.

programme.title: The Bachelorette
programme.desc: 'S18/E18'. Catch the live audience, the last dates, the choosing of the rings and the proposals.

programme.title: Angel Has Fallen
programme.desc: Gerard Butler returns for the third instalment of this action-packed franchise. Mike Banning is on the run after he is framed for the attempted assassination of the President.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: 'S12/E3 - There's Sutton About Crystal'. Kyle invites her friends to the desert for the launch of her new store. Sutton apologizes to Dorit for seeming unsympathetic following her home invasion.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Beverly Hills
programme.desc: 'S12/E4 - The Crystal Conundrum'. Crystal talks through her differences with the group, but the conversation takes an unexpected detour when she brings up old wounds.

programme.title: SEAL Team
programme.desc: 'S5/E9 of 14 - Close To Home'. Jason is forced to seek refuge with his father after his identity is compromised. Ray leads Bravo's Team on an op accompanying British forces.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia
programme.desc: 'S13/E44 - Pressure Test'. Jock Zonfrillo, Melissa Leong and Andy Allen return as judges for this simmering season of Australia's popular reality cooking competition

programme.title: The Cleaning Lady
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - The Lion's Den'. Thony turns to the syndicate to get medical help for her son.

programme.title: Family Or Fiancé USA
programme.desc: 'S3/E12 of 20 - Ivy And Carlos: The Past Stays In The Picture'. An interracial couple tries to navigate cultural differences and crossed boundaries with family. The bride insists she has sufficiently grieved her first husband's death.

programme.title: FBI: International
programme.desc: 'S1/E11 - Chew Toy'. When an NYPD officer is detained in Transnistria for aggravated assault, the Fly Team investigates his claims of infiltrating a sex trafficking ring being concealed by those in power.

programme.title: The Bachelorette
programme.desc: 'S18/E17'. Viewers are back tracked to the bachelorette's her last date with Brandon where she tells him she loves him.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 of 14 - A Pink Cadillac And A Glorious...'. Sheldon attends his first comic book convention. Also, Mary tries selling make-up.

programme.title: Ordinary Joe
programme.desc: 'S1/E12 - Whiteout'. A winter blizzard forces each Joe to confront the limits of his own control. Music Joe goes full rock star mode while on tour alone. An unsavoury family secret threatens Cop Joe and Amy.

programme.title: FBI: Most Wanted
programme.desc: 'S3/E11 of 18 - Hunter'. The Fugitive Task Force chases a killer who plays a twisted game of cat and mouse with his victims.

programme.title: All American
programme.desc: 'S4/E17 of 20 - Hate Me Now'. Spencer and Olivia are forced to acknowledge how much they have changed after some quality time together doesn't go smoothly, putting a strain on their relationship.

programme.title: The Masked Singer
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 of 13 - Semifinals'. An incredible singing competition where a group of celebrity performers wear costumes to conceal identities. One singer is eliminated each week and unmasked.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: 'S1/E3 - The Ladonna Life'. LaDonna signs up for fifteen more minutes of fame but quickly realizes she doesn't have the clout she once had. Shanice takes a step towards repairing her relationship with her daughter.

programme.title: The 4400
programme.desc: 'S1/E4 - Harlem's Renaissance Man'. Finally, there is good news for a few of the 4400. Andre looks to study some of his new friends, but mistakes from his past affect him in the present. Rev finds some information about his son.

programme.title: Black-ish
programme.desc: 'S8/E3 - Bow-M0'. Dre calls into a radio show and gets humiliated in front of Diane and tries to redeem himself. Bow tries to bond with a group of young female doctors and learns a hard truth.

programme.title: Good Sam
programme.desc: 'S1/E2 - Natural Order'. Dr. Sam Griffith fights to keep her new leadership role as chief of surgery when her father and former boss, Dr. Rob 'Griff' Griffith, takes his case for reinstatement directly to the hospital board.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy
programme.desc: 'S18/E17 - I'll Cover You'. A former patient of Link's, Simon, is in the ER with his pregnant wife, and Bailey receives an offer from Nick.

programme.title: Station 19
programme.desc: 'S5/E12 of 18 - In My Tree'. The Dean Miller Memorial Clinic has its opening day. Meanwhile, Sullivan gives Beckett an ultimatum, and the crew responds to a skydiving incident.

programme.title: Legacy
programme.desc: 'S2/E13 of 164'. Marco starts to dig around at Legacy. What will he find out? Angelique's latest move against the Hugo's has the opposite effect she intended. It spurs Robbie's fury and determination instead of scaring him off.

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: 'S15/E33 of 57 - Living Room And Dining Room Week'. Some teams are struggling with budgets, but they are putting their all in to finish their huge living and dining rooms.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: 'S4/E12 of 22 - Under Pressure'. Maggie goes undercover working in a bar to investigate an anti-government group that regularly gathers there, a single father on the periphery of the group begins to fear he's in danger.

programme.title: Halo
programme.desc: 'S1/E6 - Solace'. The mysterious artifact shows John something startling. Survivors of the battle with the Covenant return to Reach. John confronts Dr Halsey and her lies. The new prisoner seems to know John better than he knows himself.

programme.title: The Real Housewives Of Potomac
programme.desc: 'S6/E15 - Lost At Sea'. Wendy's couple's trip continues, and so does the drama. Gizelle and Robyn leave in the middle of the night, furthering the tension between them and Wendy.
